expected_path_note: final=Y (past-only) -> cooled_down: ended ~30 months ago (>=24), no evidence of return -> cooled_down_siap (path b)
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 18 – Former Owner Sold Thirty Months Ago No Return
activities: Gerhard Steiner owned and ran a contracting company that built government hospitals and ministry buildings in Azerbaijan for two decades. He sold 100% of the company to an international group in January 2024 — approximately 30 months ago and retired from the industry; since then he has held no role, shareholding or advisory function in any construction business, and he told the adviser he has no plans to return, devoting himself to a vineyard in Styria. About 60% of his wealth consists of the sale proceeds, which he has since reinvested in diversified securities and the vineyard estate; he holds no construction-related assets today.
origin_of_assets: Proceeds from the sale of his contracting company 30 months ago; vineyard income.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Sale proceeds invested in securities; vineyard estate.
